title: ThermoRoute: an audited retrospective benchmark for daily river water-temperature hindcasting
description: Research code, configuration, development panels, and derived artifacts for an audited retrospective 1/3/7-day river water-temperature hindcasting benchmark. ThermoRoute combines a statistical thermal-relaxation proposal, bounded neural correction, quantile heads, and split-conformal interval calibration, and compares them with prespecified statistical and machine-learning baselines on historical USGS sites. The repository does not establish an as-issued operational forecast, an ungauged-site capability, an identified energy-balance mechanism, or any physical, regulatory, deployment, tail-risk, or safety guarantee. Any redistribution of source observations remains subject to source-specific terms and a separate data-licensing review.
